column1: We are next to her. She looks at ___ in silence.
He shows his granny the book. He shows ___ the book.
I show the book to my dad. I show the book to ___.
We want to go with you. Take ___ as you find us.
He needs to talk to me. Tell ___ to call me up right away.
They are great! Tell me everything about ___
He gives you a letter. This letter is for ___.
You have a birthday! I give ____ a present.
She is a good person. Don't speak about ____ like this.
We have a party! You give ____ a present.
